data.description: Complete the hero section design and content. The hero currently has the Fractal/Collective heading with Jacquard 24 font, a 3D fractal icosahedron, SVG skyline silhouette, and text shadow for readability. Finalize copy, layout, and visual polish.
data.title: Finish editing the hero section

data.reason: Hero layout (FRAC-12) and font hierarchy (FRAC-13) are done. Need human direction on what else to change — copy, colors, 3D object adjustments, etc.

provenance.reason: Hero layout (FRAC-12) and font hierarchy (FRAC-13) are done. Need human direction on what else to change — copy, colors, 3D object adjustments, etc.

data.body: Hero layout rearranged (FRAC-12) and font hierarchy updated (FRAC-13). The hero now has: centered Fractal/Collective at top, '2021' copy bottom-left, 'Explore' link bottom-right, 3D fractal icosahedron, SVG skyline. Need human direction on remaining polish — copy changes, visual tweaks, etc.
